chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Second Appeal No.67 of 2020 Date Order with Signature of Judge Fresh Case 1. For order on CMA No.1708/2020. 2. For order on CMA No.1709/2020. 3. For hearing of main case. 23.01.2026 Mr. Muhammad Ateeq Qureshi, Advocate for the appellant. ------------------------------------ Learned counsel for the appellant on instructions does not wish to press this appeal and seeks its withdrawal. Accordingly, this Second Appeal is dismissed as withdrawn alongwith listed applications. J U D G E Asif
